_description: Teacher fusion training — privileged information (clean image + depth). Based on train_kwargs_optimized_drivable.json with teacher-specific additions: fusion_kwargs, apply_fog=false, per-backbone optimizer groups, optional YOLOP warm-start.

model_kwargs._warm_start_description: Optional YOLOP checkpoints loaded into image/depth backbones non-strictly. depth_backbone_init=null reuses image weights for the depth backbone. null on this smoke run.

fusion_kwargs._description: Fusion stacks per (task, tap_layer). Channels MUST match the cfg's output at those layer indices — verify with forward_backbone(dummy_image, [17,20,23]).
fusion_kwargs._fusion_type_note: AttentionBasedFusion is non-square-rejected; use 'simple' at 768x1280 or switch image_resize to a square size (640x640) for attention.
fusion_kwargs._num_blocks_note: Start at 1 for the first feasibility run; bump to 3 once loss is decreasing.

dataset_kwargs._teacher_required_description: dataset_class=foggy + apply_fog=false produces (clean image + depth) — the privileged-information input. train_teacher.py asserts both.

adverse_params._backend_note: Heuristic for fast iteration. Swap to depth_anything (+ collate_path=gpu) when wall-clock allows.

dataset_kwargs._workers_note: Foggy path forces num_workers=0 regardless. Set to 0 here for clarity.

optimizer_kwargs._description: Per-backbone freeze groups. image_backbone_kwargs / depth_backbone_kwargs each shape what get_param_groups produces; fusion_lr_scale gates the new fusion params.

image_backbone_kwargs._description: Image backbone: warm-started from YOLOP, all layers trainable so fusion can adapt the representation. Freeze early layers if you want to preserve the pretrained features more strictly.

depth_backbone_kwargs._description: Depth backbone: forward_backbone early-exits at max(tap)=23, so head layers (24+) are never invoked. Freeze them to keep the param count honest and avoid optimizer overhead.

trainer_kwargs._checkpoint_path_note: Set to a previous teacher checkpoint to RESUME training; null on first run. Distinct from model_kwargs.image_backbone_init which only warm-starts backbone weights.
trainer_kwargs._smoke_cap_note: max_train_iters/max_eval_iters early-break each epoch's loop. Drop these for full training.

loss_weights._description: Match drivable config; lane_segmentation=0 since no seg annotations dir.
